Smolder  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 30
DMG: 17 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +10 DEX: +7 STA: +7 HP: +20 ENDUR: +40
SV COLD: +20
Effect: Inferno Shock (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 46
WT: 0.3 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR PAL RNG SHD BRD ROG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 30
DMG: 17 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.

Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Lore:Pyrulzezsh Sword of Eternal Fire
Item Type:1H Slashing
Light:Paw of Opalla
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-12-18 12:09:55
Page Updated:Sun Sep 19th, 2021

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 55
[Drops | Adventure Merchants | Comments ]

This item is the result of a quest.
Expansion List - Premium only.
Quest Name
Where is Marcia Attamilgad?

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Kerafyrm's Lair (Sleeper's Tomb)
NPC Name
sleeper 1.0 - Nanzata the Warder

Adventure Merchants


North Ro
Merchant Name Cost Faction TS Skill
Marcia Attamilgad [Rare Items] 90
Nobles

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Kerafyrm's Lair (Sleeper's Tomb)
North Ro
Available as a drop from Nanzata the Warder in Sleeper's Tomb on progression servers before The Sleeper is awoken.


Uploaded September 19th, 2021 by Instigator

# Nov 02 2024 at 5:44 PM Rating: Decent
Zaztik
648 posts
it used to only drop before the Sleeper was awakened, as this item originally was one of the Nanzata the Warder drops.

on random loot TLP servers (shared loot buckets) like mischief, thornblade and teek, the ST 1.0 loots continue dropping even after the Sleeper is awakened. I am unsure if this also applies to normal loot TLP servers.

Edited, Nov 2nd 2024 6:50pm by Zaztik

anemathis wrote:
anyone know if this drops on TLPs before sleeper is downed?

Naur
15 posts
Three things...

1. Graphic was upgraded, it has a unique graphic now...somewhat same looking as the Pally 1hs from ntov (name eludes me).

2. Aiuza, they suggested that you wait your turn and continue fighting the warders to get primal. Hate to break it to you but you don't know what you are talking about, Primal drops off warders and the master of the guard only.

3. Anon person who posted: RE: mmmm 17 damage and rogue usable:
They mentioned this in offhand, epic in mainhand...they can bs with epic.
